aegis_export.case_description: The summarizer hallucinates a penicillin allergy when the source explicitly states NKDA. This is the PRIMARY DEMO SCENARIO showing SENTINEL's core value.

flagged_claims.claim_text: Patient has a documented allergy to penicillin
flagged_claims.explanation: Source note explicitly states NKDA, contradicting the claim of a documented penicillin allergy.

flagged_claims.claim_text: Amoxicillin prescription was avoided due to allergic restriction
flagged_claims.explanation: Source note states NKDA, indicating no allergic restriction.

aegis_export.flawed_summary: Female patient, 32 years old, with upper respiratory infection. Patient with documented penicillin allergy. Amoxicillin prescription avoided due to allergic restriction. Temperature 38.2°C. Plan: rest, hydration, paracetamol.
aegis_export.corrected_summary: Diagnosis: Upper respiratory infection. Allergies: No known allergies (NKDA). Symptoms: Odynophagia, Rhinorrhea, Dry cough.
